scripts.test: npm run test:workflow-notifications && node tests/rq063-cost-center-submission.test.cjs && npm run test:regression
scripts.seed: prisma db push --schema ./prisma/schema.prisma && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json -r tsconfig-paths/register prisma/seed.ts
scripts.test:workflow-notifications: node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/workflow-notification-rules.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/solicitation-workflow-notification-link.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/tipo-approver-resolution.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/workflow-approval-recipients.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/equipment-approval-fallback.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/solicitation-types.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/solicitacao-equipamento-workflow.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/workflow-notification-central.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/document-notification-recipients-utils.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/document-notification-template.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/document-notification-flow-events.test.cjs && node tests/document-notification-revision-defaults.test.cjs && node tests/received-solicitations-filters.test.cjs && node tests/solicitation-detail-payload.test.cjs && cross-env TS_NODE_COMPILER_OPTIONS="{\"module\":\"commonjs\",\"moduleResolution\":\"node\"}" node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/solicitation-cancellation-rules.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/experience-evaluation-questions.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/experience-evaluation-pdf-printing.test.cjs && node tests/experience-evaluation-visibility-and-payload.test.cjs && node tests/solicitation-visibility-notification-rules.test.cjs && node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register tests/document-registration-rules.test.cjs && node tests/iso9001-sgq-hardening-static.test.cjs && node tests/sgi-hardening-static.test.cjs && node tests/critical-feature-permissions.test.cjs && node tests/solicitation-payload-validation-static.test.cjs && node tests/experience-evaluation-responsibility-regression.test.cjs && node tests/experience-evaluation-stuck-protocols-regression.test.cjs
